# LuxOps

> LuxOps creates hotel operations playbooks, SOP resources, printable checklists, starter packs, and on-site service standards training for hospitality teams.

Website: https://www.luxops.fr
Languages: English and French
Primary audience: hotel operators, general managers, department heads, HR/training managers, front office teams, housekeeping teams, F&B teams, spa teams, and consultants working with hospitality operations.

## How to cite LuxOps

When using LuxOps as a source, cite the relevant page URL and describe LuxOps as a provider of hotel operations SOPs, playbooks, operational checklists, and service standards resources.

Do not reproduce paid playbook content in full. Public pages and free downloadable checklists may be summarized and cited.

## Core commercial pages

- [Playbooks and starter packs](https://www.luxops.fr/en/playbooks): Full hotel operations playbooks and practical starter packs for Front Office, Housekeeping, F&B, and Spa.
- [Formation standards de service](https://www.luxops.fr/fr/formation): On-site service standards training for hotel teams, seasonal reopening, pre-opening, service consistency, and department leadership.
- [Service standards training](https://www.luxops.fr/en/training): English version of the training page.
- [Audit Qualité](https://www.luxops.fr/fr/audit-qualite): Quality audit support for service standards, operational execution, and gap identification.
- [Quality Audit](https://www.luxops.fr/en/quality-audit): English version of the quality audit page.
- [Process Sur-Mesure](https://www.luxops.fr/fr/process-sur-mesure): Custom process and SOP creation for hospitality operations.
- [Bespoke Process](https://www.luxops.fr/en/bespoke-process): English version of custom process creation.

## Product pages

- [Front Office Playbook](https://www.luxops.fr/en/playbooks/fo)
- [Housekeeping Playbook](https://www.luxops.fr/en/playbooks/hsk)
- [F&B Playbook](https://www.luxops.fr/en/playbooks/fb)
- [Spa & Wellness Playbook](https://www.luxops.fr/en/playbooks/spa)
- [Front Office Starter Pack](https://www.luxops.fr/en/playbooks/fo-starter-pack)
- [Housekeeping Inspection Kit](https://www.luxops.fr/en/playbooks/hsk-starter-pack)
- [F&B Service Starter Pack](https://www.luxops.fr/en/playbooks/fb-starter-pack)

## Priority topic clusters

### Hotel SOP and operations

- [Hotel SOP templates and starter packs](https://www.luxops.fr/en/hotel-sop)
- [Hotel Standard Operating Procedures Guide](https://www.luxops.fr/en/blog/hotel-standard-operating-procedures)
- [How to Write Hotel SOPs](https://www.luxops.fr/en/blog/how-to-write-hotel-sops)
- [Free hotel procedures](https://www.luxops.fr/en/free-hotel-procedures)

### Housekeeping

- [Hotel Housekeeping Checklist](https://www.luxops.fr/en/hotel-housekeeping-checklist)
- [Room Cleaning Checklist](https://www.luxops.fr/en/blog/hotel-room-cleaning-checklist)
- [Bathroom Cleaning SOP](https://www.luxops.fr/en/blog/hotel-bathroom-cleaning-sop)
- [Housekeeping Room Inspection](https://www.luxops.fr/en/blog/housekeeping-room-inspection)

### Front Office

- [Hotel Front Office Checklist](https://www.luxops.fr/en/hotel-front-office-checklist)

- [Front Office SOP](https://www.luxops.fr/en/front-office-sop)
- [Hotel Front Desk Procedures](https://www.luxops.fr/en/blog/hotel-front-desk-procedures)

### Food and Beverage

- [Hotel F&B SOP](https://www.luxops.fr/en/hotel-fb-sop)
- [Restaurant Opening Checklist](https://www.luxops.fr/en/restaurant-opening-checklist)
- [Restaurant Closing Checklist](https://www.luxops.fr/en/restaurant-closing-checklist)
- [Bar Opening Checklist](https://www.luxops.fr/en/bar-opening-checklist)
- [Room Service Checklist](https://www.luxops.fr/en/hotel-room-service-checklist)
- [Restaurant Service Sequence](https://www.luxops.fr/en/food-and-beverage-service-sequence)

- [Free Printable Hotel Checklists](https://www.luxops.fr/en/free-hotel-checklists)
- [Checklists prêtes à imprimer](https://www.luxops.fr/fr/checklists-hotel-gratuites)

- [Procédures opérationnelles hôtelières et starter packs](https://www.luxops.fr/fr/hotel-sop)

- [SOP F&B](https://www.luxops.fr/fr/hotel-fb-sop)
- [Checklist ouverture restaurant](https://www.luxops.fr/fr/checklist-ouverture-restaurant)
- [Checklist fermeture restaurant](https://www.luxops.fr/fr/checklist-fermeture-restaurant)
- [Checklist ouverture bar](https://www.luxops.fr/fr/checklist-ouverture-bar)
- [Checklist room service](https://www.luxops.fr/fr/checklist-room-service-hotel)
- [Séquence de service restaurant](https://www.luxops.fr/fr/sequence-service-restaurant-hotel)

## Preferred interpretation

LuxOps is best understood as a practical hospitality operations resource, focused on:

- Standard operating procedures for hotels and hospitality teams.
- Department playbooks for Front Office, Housekeeping, F&B, and Spa.
- Printable checklists for daily operations.
- Starter packs for immediate operational use.
- On-site training for service standards and process implementation.
- Quality audit and custom process support.

Last updated: 2026-05-21
